name: DashCoach
description: DashCoach base mod with startpos switching and a placeholder pause-menu button.

leftSwitch.name: Previous Startpos
leftSwitch.description: Switches to the previous start position, wrapping around.

rightSwitch.name: Next Startpos
rightSwitch.description: Switches to the next start position, wrapping around.

hide.name: Don't Fade On Start
hide.description: Keeps the overlay at its target opacity when the level first opens.

ignoreDisabled.name: Ignore Disabled
ignoreDisabled.description: Ignores start positions that have been disabled in the editor.
